title: After the Queen Elizabeth II Cup: It's Decided!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sweep Tosho runs a fantastic race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Judging from her performance today and how
hard she fought in the Triple Tiara races, I'd be
surprised if anyone doubted her credentials as a
representative of the Tiara winners.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Wooooo!
Sweep! Sweep! Sweep!
Sweeeep!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Show us your magic! Show us that strength is
strength! Prove it in your senior-year races!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She smiles confidently amidst the roaring cheers,
and I realize I have the answer! The perfect race
for her to realize everything she's worked for is...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You've made up your mind, right? Good. Let me
hear it!
choice_data_list: Right. Our next race goal is...
Right. Our next race goal is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race I suggest has to be the best possible
stage—a spring race in which only chosen
Umamusume are permitted to compete.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And not only that, but a grueling event that no
Umamusume on the Triple Tiara tour has
managed to win in decades.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that's where she's going to cast her
magic on the whole world.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that's where she's going to cast her
magic on the whole world.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hah! The Takarazuka Kinen, huh? I like it. You
pass.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Buuuut!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Too baaad! ♪ I can't give you a gold star for that
answer!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I don't think the Takarazuka Kinen is a
bad race to shoot for. It's just not enough on its
own.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
If I'm gonna use a grand magic spell to change the
world, that one race isn't gonna cut it. I've gotta
do something even more special.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: You get where this is going, right, Familiar?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna run in the Yasuda Kinen, too!
choice_data_list:
The Yasuda Kinen and then the Takarazuka
Kinen too?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Yasuda Kinen is held in the first half of June,
and the Takarazuka Kinen in the second half.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Competing in the Takarazuka Kinen alone is
going to make for a formidable challenge, and
there's just not enough time between races!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try explaining that most racers would never
normally attempt both, but she stops me.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You should already know this, but normal's not
gonna fly!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna pull off my grand magic spell at the
most ultra special race of all!
